title: Check if The Number is Fascinating

testcases.input: n = 192 Output: true Explanation: We concatenate the numbers n = 192 and 2 * n = 384 and 3 * n = 576. The resulting number is 192384576. This number contains all the digits from 1 to 9 exactly once.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: We concatenate the numbers n = 192 and 2 * n = 384 and 3 * n = 576. The resulting number is 192384576. This number contains all the digits from 1 to 9 exactly once.

testcases.input: n = 100 Output: false Explanation: We concatenate the numbers n = 100 and 2 * n = 200 and 3 * n = 300. The resulting number is 100200300. This number does not satisfy any of the conditions.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: We concatenate the numbers n = 100 and 2 * n = 200 and 3 * n = 300. The resulting number is 100200300. This number does not satisfy any of the conditions.
